values.value:
Dear {!RW_Booking__r.Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!
This is a reminder to kindly upload your home loan sanction letter within the next 3 days so that we can proceed further with your booking formalities.
You may upload the sanction letter directly on the Runwal app using the link below:
Upload Sanction Letter: {!$Label.App_Link}
Timely submission of the sanction letter will help avoid any delays in the next steps of your booking process.
If you require any assistance, please feel free to reach out to your Relationship Manager (RM).
Warm regards, Runwal Enterprises
Reminder – Upload Your Home Loan Sanction Letter

Sanction Letter Pending 📄
Please upload your home loan sanction letter within 3 days to proceed smoothly with your booking.
